domain: Tibetan singing bowl (Himalayan ritual; multiple vibrational modes; selective partial-excitation via mallet position/material/stroke; radial+tangential modes concurrent with beating)
specific_mechanism: K parallel decoders each at distinct phase offset in (temperature, top-p, repetition-penalty) parameter space; phase offsets at golden-angle-divided points to maximally cover decoder strategy space; judge selects final from K modal samples.
llm_application: BOWL-PARTIAL: a phase-coherent multi-decoder strategy. Run K parallel decoders simultaneously; each decoder k uses a distinct (temperature_k, top_p_k, repetition_penalty_k) configuration placed at GOLDEN-ANGLE-DIVIDED points on the unit cube of decoder strategy parameters. Each decoder produces a sample; a judge selects final output from K modal samples. Phase-offset spacing ensures samples cover distinct distribution modes. Differs from Diverse Beam Search 1610.02424 (token-level dissimilarity reward not strategy-space phase), Arithmetic Sampling Vilnis 2023 (single-strategy parallel only), Top-P/Min-P/Mirostat (single strategy variants) by combining (a) K-decoder STRATEGY-SPACE phase offset, (b) GOLDEN-ANGLE divided coverage, (c) judge-selection over modal samples.
novelty_claim: Diverse Beam Search + Arithmetic Sampling + Top-P/Min-P decoding strategies all exist. BOWL-PARTIAL recombines K-decoder + strategy-space phase offset + golden-angle coverage. Recombination of existing components.
